title: Portal's Superpowers Reloaded
description: This is a reload of my mod "Portal's Superpowers" standing at nearly 3k downloads. This doesn't include every power in the original, but it has the important ones.
body:
This is a reload of my mod "Portal's Superpowers" standing at nearly 3k downloads. This doesn't include every power in the original, but it has the important ones.

Telekinesis - Allows flying, along with flinging entities with a simple right click

Pyrokinesis - Shoots a small fireball that ignites things with right click

Healing - Heals you to a maximum of 10 hearts (or 20 health) with a right click

Saturating - Fully saturates you, eating is optional now with a right click

Sculking - Sculk-ifys blocks with a right click

Time Control - Allows you to pause and unpause time (Pause is right click, unpause is Shift + Right Click)

Electrifier - Summons a bolt of lightning onto whatever block you're looking at with right click, currently the range is 20 blocks maximum

Cukinesis - Replace any block with copper on right click, and when in your off-hand, any placed block will be copper

Biokinesis - Right click on a mob to summon another of that mob, and hitting a mob deals significantly more damage


Give me feedback for things you'd like to see in this mod, whether it's new or from the original.
